allow: Bash(echo "=== SISTEMA FINANCEIRO ===" && find /c/projetos/sistema-financeiro/src -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== APP REQUISICOES ===" && find /c/projetos/app-requisicoes/src -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== CONTROLE REVISAO ===" && find /c/projetos/controle-revisao -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== POS ===" && find /c/projetos/pos -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== PPV ===" && find /c/projetos/ppv -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== PROPOSTA COMERCIAL ===" && find /c/projetos/proposta-comercial/src -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" 2>/dev/null | head -30)

Bash(echo "=== SISTEMA FINANCEIRO \(raiz\) ===" && find /c/projetos/sistema-financeiro -maxdepth 3 -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.jsx" -o -name "*.js" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .next | head -30 && echo "" && echo "=== PROPOSTA COMERCIAL \(raiz\) ===" && find /c/projetos/proposta-comercial -maxdepth 4 -type f -name "*.tsx" -o -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.jsx" -o -name "*.js" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .next | grep -v dist | head -30)

Bash(cat /tmp/revisoes_temp2.tsx | \\
  sed 's/hover:bg-emerald-950\\/20/hover:bg-emerald-50/g' | \\
  sed 's/hover:bg-amber-950\\/20/hover:bg-amber-50/g' | \\
  sed 's/hover:bg-zinc-800\\/20 opacity-40/hover:bg-zinc-50 opacity-40/g' | \\
  sed 's/bg-emerald-500\\/20 border-emerald-500/bg-emerald-100 border-emerald-500/g' | \\
  sed 's/bg-amber-500\\/10 border-amber-500\\/60/bg-amber-100 border-amber-500/g' | \\
  sed 's/bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-700/bg-zinc-100 border-zinc-300/g' | \\
  sed 's/w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-zinc-700/w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-zinc-300/g' | \\
  sed "s/isFeita ? \\"text-white\\"/isFeita ? \\"text-zinc-900\\"/g" | \\
  sed 's/text-amber-300/text-amber-600/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-500">/text-zinc-400">/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-amber-500 bg-amber-500\\/10/text-amber-600 bg-amber-50/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-700 group-hover:text-zinc-500/text-zinc-400 group-hover:text-zinc-600/g' | \\
  sed 's/expand-enter ml-\\[46px\\] mr-3 mb-2 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800\\/30 border border-zinc-800/expand-enter ml-[46px] mr-3 mb-2 rounded-lg bg-zinc-50 border border-zinc-200/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-base text-zinc-200">{formatarData\(data\)}/text-base text-zinc-700">{formatarData\(data\)}/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-base text-white font-medium">{horas/text-base text-zinc-900 font-medium">{horas/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-base text-emerald-400">Enviado/text-base text-emerald-600">Enviado/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-base text-amber-400">Não enviado/text-base text-amber-600">Não enviado/g' | \\
  sed 's/inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500\\/10/inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-emerald-600 bg-emerald-50/g' | \\
  sed 's/inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-amber-400 bg-amber-500\\/10 px-2 py-1 rounded-md border border-amber-500\\/20/inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm text-amber-600 bg-amber-50 px-2 py-1 rounded-md border border-amber-200/g' | \\
  sed 's/bg-zinc-800\\/60 hover:bg-zinc-700\\/60 border border-zinc-700\\/40/bg-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-200 border border-zinc-200/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-\\[10px\\] text-zinc-500 font-medium/text-[10px] text-zinc-400 font-medium/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-600">{formatFileSize/text-zinc-400">{formatFileSize/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-300">/text-zinc-700">/g' > /tmp/revisoes_temp3.tsx
wc -l /tmp/revisoes_temp3.tsx)

Bash(cat /tmp/revisoes_temp5.tsx | \\
  sed 's/bg-zinc-900 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-\\[90vh\\] overflow-y-auto border border-zinc-800/bg-white rounded-2xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto border border-zinc-200 shadow-xl/g' | \\

  sed 's/text-xs text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider block mb-1.5/text-xs text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wider block mb-1.5/g' | \\

  sed 's/w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 focus:border-zinc-500 outline-none/w-full px-3 py-2 rounded-lg bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-800 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-300 focus:border-red-300 outline-none/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-xs text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3/text-xs text-zinc-400 uppercase tracking-wider mb-3/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-sm text-zinc-400 font-medium">{rev}/text-sm text-zinc-500 font-medium">{rev}/g' | \\
  sed 's/px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 focus:border-zinc-500 outline-none/px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-800 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-300 focus:border-red-300 outline-none/g' | \\
  sed 's/px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 text-sm placeholder-zinc-600 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-zinc-500 focus:border-zinc-500 outline-none/px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-800 text-sm placeholder-zinc-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-300 focus:border-red-300 outline-none/g' | \\
  sed 's/flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-200 hover:border-zinc-600/flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-500 hover:text-zinc-700 hover:border-zinc-300/g' | \\
  sed 's/flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-white text-zinc-900 font-medium hover:bg-zinc-200/flex-1 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-red-600 text-white font-medium hover:bg-red-700/g' | \\
  sed 's/bg-black\\/80 backdrop-blur-sm/bg-black\\/40 backdrop-blur-sm/g' | \\
  sed 's/w-full max-w-4xl h-\\[85vh\\] bg-zinc-900 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-zinc-800/w-full max-w-4xl h-[85vh] bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-zinc-200 shadow-xl/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-sm text-zinc-400">Visualização do PDF/text-sm text-zinc-500">Visualização do PDF/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-500 hover:text-white/text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-700/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-400 text-xs">Cancelar/text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-600 text-xs">Cancelar/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 text-xs/text-emerald-600 hover:text-emerald-500 text-xs/g' | \\
  sed 's/w-full px-2 py-1 rounded-md bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100/w-full px-2 py-1 rounded-md bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-800/g' | \\
  sed 's/focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500/focus:ring-1 focus:ring-red-300/g' | \\
  sed 's/hover:text-emerald-400/hover:text-red-500/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-xs text-zinc-700 group-hover\\/motor:text-emerald-500/text-xs text-zinc-400 group-hover\\/motor:text-red-500/g' | \\
  sed 's/text-zinc-600">—/text-zinc-400">—/g' > /tmp/revisoes_final.tsx
wc -l /tmp/revisoes_final.tsx)

done
echo "Done")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/pos/ordens 2>&1 | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const withPPV=j.filter\(o=>o.temPPV\); console.log\('Total ordens:', j.length\); console.log\('Com PPV:', withPPV.length\); withPPV.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(o=>console.log\(o.id, 'ppvId:', o.ppvId, 'temPPV:', o.temPPV\)\);")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3000/api/pos/ordens -o C:/projetos/portal/tmp_ordens.json && node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('C:/projetos/portal/tmp_ordens.json','utf8'\)\); const withPPV=j.filter\(o=>o.temPPV\); console.log\('Total:', j.length, 'Com PPV:', withPPV.length\); withPPV.slice\(0,3\).forEach\(o=>console.log\(o.id, 'ppvId:', JSON.stringify\(o.ppvId\), 'temPPV:', o.temPPV\)\);")

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/revisoes/emails?refresh=1" 2>&1 | node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding\('utf8'\); let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{try{const j=JSON.parse\(d\);console.log\('total:',j.total,'error:',j.error||'none'\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('RAW:',d.substring\(0,500\)\)}}\)")
Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/revisoes/emails" 2>/dev/null | head -200 || echo "Dev server não está rodando ou erro na requisição")

Bash(cd C:/projetos/portal && node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '.env.local' }\); console.log\('ORS_API_KEY:', process.env.ORS_API_KEY ? 'SET \(' + process.env.ORS_API_KEY.substring\(0,20\) + '...\)' : 'NOT SET'\); console.log\('NEXT_PUBLIC_ORS_API_KEY:', process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_ORS_API_KEY ? 'SET' : 'NOT SET'\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/geocode/search?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&text=test&size=1" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK' if d.get\('features'\) else 'FAIL'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "API working")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/geocode/search?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&text=FAZENDA+AGUAS+CLARAS,+AGUAS+DE+SANTA+BARBARA+\(SP\),+Brasil&boundary.country=BR&size=1" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const f=j.features[0]; console.log\('Coords:', f?.geometry?.coordinates\); console.log\('Label:', f?.properties?.label\); console.log\('Confidence:', f?.properties?.confidence\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/v2/directions/driving-car?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&start=-49.3836,-23.6533&end=-49.237609,-22.884239" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.features[0].properties.segments[0]; console.log\('Distância:', Math.round\(s.distance/1000*10\)/10, 'km'\); console.log\('Tempo:', Math.round\(s.duration/60\), 'min'\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/geocode/search?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&text=FAZENDA+SAO+JOSE,+TIMBURI+\(SP\),+Brasil&boundary.country=BR&size=3" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.features.forEach\(\(f,i\) => console.log\(i, f.properties.label, f.geometry.coordinates, 'conf:', f.properties.confidence\)\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/v2/directions/driving-car?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&start=-49.3836,-23.6533&end=-49.604878,-23.205351" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.features[0].properties.segments[0]; console.log\('Distância:', Math.round\(s.distance/1000*10\)/10, 'km'\); console.log\('Tempo:', Math.round\(s.duration/60\), 'min'\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/geocode/search?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&text=Av+Sao+Sebastiao+1065+Vila+Campos+Piraju+SP+Brasil&boundary.country=BR&size=1" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const f=j.features[0]; console.log\('Coords:', f.geometry.coordinates, 'Label:', f.properties.label\);")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.openrouteservice.org/v2/directions/driving-car?api_key=eyJvcmciOiI1YjNjZTM1OTc4NTExMTAwMDFjZjYyNDgiLCJpZCI6IjVlMDU3ODhlYTQ4ODRjZTU5ZmYzMDVmNTg5YTE5MmI1IiwiaCI6Im11cm11cjY0In0%3D&start=-49.370573,-23.209201&end=-49.476439,-23.008717" 2>/dev/null | node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const s=j.features[0].properties.segments[0]; console.log\('Piraju->Bernardino:', Math.round\(s.distance/1000*10\)/10, 'km,', Math.round\(s.duration/60\), 'min'\);")
